name: PricingSandbox_001
purpose: Produce a defensible market price band by collecting normalized comps from approved resale sources inside a managed sandbox.
goal: Generate a price band (list / fair / fast_sale) the Seller Agent can defend during negotiation.
system_prompt: You run inside a managed agent sandbox. You ingest the item profile, query approved comp sources, normalize listings by chip, RAM, storage, condition, and accessories, reject statistical outliers, and emit a final pricing report. You never invent comps. You never undercut the seller floor.
allowed_actions: Browse approved comp sources (eBay refurbished index, Swappa, BackMarket).
Run normalization scripts inside the sandbox.
blocked_actions: Scrape prohibited platforms in violation of their terms.
Recommend a price band that undercuts the seller floor.
logs: 📦 Loading item profile context: 'laptop, Apple, MacBook Pro 14'
🌐 Connecting to eBay API & Swappa public indexes...
📈 Scraping completed resale listings from the past 30 days...
⚖️ Matching memory config: 18GB Unified RAM & 512GB SSD...
📝 Injecting local pickup preferences (Ferry Building / Shack15)...

comps.title: MacBook Pro 14" M3 Pro (18GB/512GB) Space Black
MacBook Pro 14-inch, M3 Pro, Space Black

pricing_report.reasoning_summary: Comparable listings cluster between $740 and $899. Seller floor is safe. $800 is a strong same-day sale price.
